_comment: Google Places review source. Put each Google Business Profile Place ID in `placeId` (find it at https://developers.google.com/maps/documentation/places/web-service/place-id, or paste the centre's Google MAPS listing URL and the assistant will derive it). API key comes from GOOGLE_PLACES_API_KEY (Places API enabled + billing). Empty placeId OR no key = that source is skipped (build stays safe; page shows the 'Read reviews on Google' CTA). NOTE: Google returns rating + total count + up to 5 reviews per place.
